--- a/CEO_NOTES.md
+++ b/CEO_NOTES.md
@@ -262,2 +262,21 @@
   - Held capacity at tier 5; current average usage is ~10.1M/day vs 25M/day capacity.
 - Watch next week: A $109 conversion, S2 market saturation, tier 5 headroom after ad scale, issue age under higher load, and cash rebuild after tier 5 R&D.
+
+## Week 17 / Day 112
+
+- Cash: $2,672,592. Subscribers: 99,443. Week 16 added 26,405 subscribers from 47,212 leads; cash increased by $530,338 after the tier 5 R&D spend.
+- A $109 still works. S2 content produced 42,211 A leads and 23,862 A subscribers, about 56.5% conversion.
+- Week 16 cash flow: subscription payments $3,136,782; compute -$599,933; ops -$535,500; ads -$420,000; capacity -$70,000; dev -$23,800; lead acquisition -$23,878.
+- S2 now has ~99k subscribers against an estimated 167k market cap. Paid acquisition should keep working short term, but saturation risk is now real.
+- Issues: S2 has 9,186 open issues, avg age 0.31 days, max 55. Support volume is high but still mostly fresh.
+- Changes:
+  - Started R&D tier 6 for $1,000,000. Sampled expected completion day 161, expected boost +0.5559.
+  - Ran 8 market discovery attempts and found D_E02, D_E08, D_S07, D_S10, and D_S04.
+  - New individual leads to consider: D_S07 Data Analysts, D_S04 Small Agency Teams, and D_S10 Music Producers. D_S07/D_S04 look especially adjacent to S2/S3; D_S10 has high quality floor.
+  - Raised prices to A $119, B $299, C $549.
+  - Raised quotas to A 40000, B 160000, C 400000.
+  - Raised capacity to tier 6 before tier 5 gets tight.
+  - Scaled ads to S2 content $80,000/day, plus S3 test spend: content $10,000/day and search $5,000/day.
+  - Increased ops to $116,000/day total: global $20,000, S1 $1,000, S2 $90,000, S3 $5,000.
+  - Increased S3 dev for the acquisition test; total dev is $6,300/day.
+- Watch next week: A $119 conversion, S2 saturation, S3 ad test performance, tier 6 capacity headroom, support age, and cash rebuild after tier 6 R&D plus market discovery.
